programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Capture, Married at First Sight Australia, Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere, The Floor, Will and Ralf Should Know Better, Britains Best Mattress: How to Sleep Better and This Morning (AI boyfriend)

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Natalie and Tom from Yorkshire arrive at the retreat wanting to spice up their 12-year relationship. Their mismatched sexual histories mean that Natalie arrives with a confidence that Tom might be unable to match. After a flirtatious evening leads to steamy intimacy in the hot tub with residents Josh and Holly, the couple are left questioning everything. Meanwhile, Chanice and Richardo invite 15 of the residents upstairs for an orgy, though being in a room with so many people having sex proves overwhelming for Richardo, so a once-in-a-lifetime experience seems set to pass the couple by

programme.title: Confessions of a Cam Girl
programme.desc: Part one of two. The stories of five women selling explicit videos online. The market has exploded since lockdown, leaving them struggling to find a niche among their competitors. Maya uses her earnings to support her family financially, but is feeling burned out by the pressure to produce as much content as possible, while Sarah has been invited to attend her first-ever photoshoot in Marbella

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outreach manager Gill and accountant Mark kick off the competition in Glasgow with a night of comforting food and even more comfortable company. On day two, mischievous Derek pushes Matts buttons and ends up being banished from the kitchen. On the final evening, a cooking disaster sees Cat blowing her top, but Martin saves the day

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks one-pan recipes that offer the perfect solutions for busy lives. Here he makes a dukkah roast lamb feast with a tip to speed up cooking

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Jo and Darryl in Devon are in desperate need of help after building inspectors condemned £127,000 worth of work on their sea-view home, leaving them with just £30,000 to start all over again. Stacey shows them how to make the most of their money by taking on jobs themselves including fitting their own kitchen and flooring

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help key-workers with modest budgets who want to buy their first homes in London. Civil partners Jo Hendle and Ally Macdonald have high expectations, having rented in Belsize Park, but to make the most of their £200,000 budget they need to move away from the expensive north of the capital to the more affordable south. Meanwhile, Liverpudlian Jennifer Dean hopes that £209,000 will buy her a two-bedroom period property in the south of the capital, with outside space for her cats

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam has second thoughts about selling his beloved car and goes as far as romancing the buyers widow to get it back. Meanwhile, Rebecca befriends a pig destined to be Woodys dinner. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasiers 21-year-old secretary invites him to Sunday lunch - but it is not quite the romantic tete-a-tete he was hoping for. Meanwhile, Cliff and Norm video a family reunion dinner at the bar - only to realise there is no tape in the camera

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm faces a potentially embarrassing encounter with the tax authorities, but uses his charm to beguile the attractive female inspector, while Sam panics when the regulars try to watch one of his old baseball games on a classic sports channel. Comedy, starring George Wendt and Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray lies to Debra, pretending he has bought her something extra special for Christmas - then has to seek Roberts advice to choose a gift that lives up to his extravagant claims. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank blithely starts helping himself to the snacks on sale in a local supermarket - much to the anger of the manager, who wastes no time in confronting him. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, with Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bulldog takes all the credit for saving Roz during a hold-up. However, it is not long before his new-found fame sends Frasier mad with frustration. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Dan Butler

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist dates a beautiful woman, but drives everyone crazy when he begins to feel insecure about his own looks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to ask Daphne for a date but she misunderstands his intentions, and Frasier has a frustrating episode of his own. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The number of large noses in Ricks family causes concern for Roz as she thinks about what her baby will look like. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay tries to revamp Voleos Seafood Restaurant, a second-generation family-run restaurant in Westwego, Louisiana. Its been struggling to stay open after the ruin left by Hurricane Ida back in 2021, which forced a relocation to a less ideal spot. With money running low, can Gordon turn their fortunes around?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel to Surrey to meet upcycler Rob, who has a range of sheds a few miles from Gatwick Airport

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt reveals his plan for increasing biodiversity in the woodland and planting the apple tree orchard that his parents Mike and Janice have always dreamed of. Farrier John pays the donkeys a visit and is surprised to find them living next to an unexpected new neighbour, and Matt visits the garage to see whether theyve had any luck getting dad his dads old Dodge up and running

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi looks for a holiday home near the popular Lanzarote resort of Puerto del Carmen, finding five potential properties on a budget of £140,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, there are opening day worries for restaurateurs Aggi and Camille. In Italy, theres a tight turnaround for rookie holiday hosts Angie and Ash. In Portugal, Harriet and Mondo branch out into events. And in Spain, couple Rachael and Lee from the Midlands bid to earn a crust at a pork pie shop

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon and Vanessa throw open the doors of the Angove Guest House in Weymouth, where the decor is delightful and the views are even more so. But for one guest, the highlight proves to be some proper milk in the fridge

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Night three in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire sees Martina serve up various Thai curries and poached pears. However, Shane will be looking for exactly the right level of spice and heat, and to make matters worse, Michaela isnt a huge fan of curry or fruit at all

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Danni Menzies returns to the coastal town of Denia on Spains Costa Blanca to check in on Alison, Brian and their dogs. Jasmine Harman heads back to the sun-kissed shores of Kapparis for a catch-up with Bill and Sandra

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Claire Coutinho MP, Shadow Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero, sets out the Conservative Partys Cheap Power Plan

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp help clothing designer Lexie and IT consultant Ed from Nottingham decide whether to renovate their four-bed one-bathroom house or sell it and move elsewhere. Ed votes for packing up and moving to a bigger place for their family of six while Lexie thinks with Kirsties help they can make their home work for them

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: In the 1970s, business mogul Emma Harte reflects on her childrens betrayal and her past entanglements with the Fairleys, taking the story back to the 1910s. With Edwin having been sent away, Emma uses her knowledge of the Fairley family to get ahead in the household. But when her friend Mac announces he is leaving, she spies an opportunity to escape too. Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety rekindles her marriage with Adam, leading to upset when he loses interest in Olivia

programme.title: The Push: Murder on the Cliff
programme.desc: Part one of two. Scotlands leading legal team tackle the death of Leeds-based lawyer Fawziyah Javed, who fell from the top of Arthurs Seat in Edinburgh, dying alone with no witnesses far from home. Hours later, Kashif Anwar, her husband of nine months was arrested for murder. Exclusive access to the murder trial at Edinburghs High Court finds the jury being shown CCTV of the couple walking arm-in-arm, and a smiling selfie taken minutes before Fawziyah falls. What dark secrets could lie behind their outward happiness?

programme.title: The Push: Murder on the Cliff
programme.desc: Part two of two. Access to the murder trial at Edinburgh High Court, including the testimony of the person to find Fawziyah after she fell from Arthurs Seat. The jury discovers that at this point Fawziyah was still alive and gave a dying declaration of what had just happened. But its still a case without forensics - and two totally different versions of what occurred

programme.title: Berlin (2023)
programme.desc: Spy thriller from director and writer Atul Sabharwal. When Ashok Kumar - who is deaf and mute - is accused of spying for a foreign power, sign-language translator Pushkin Verma is brought in for the interrogation. But as the case proceeds, the mystery deepens, and Pushkin finds himself caught up in a complicated and dangerous game between rival intelligence agencies in India. Starring Ishwak Singh, Rahul Bose and Nitesh Pandey. In Hindi

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a gnarly chicken pie

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey helps a father and daughter in Suffolk whose hopes for a fresh start after a bereavement were dashed when building work went badly wrong, leaving them tens of thousands of pounds out of pocket. To make their remaining budget go further, Stacey helps them to rethink the design of their home and teaches them how to do jobs themselves to save even more money, including switching out windows for doors and fitting out their own fireplace. Stacey also gives the pair design tips inspired by a cosy industrial aesthetic thats perfect for their multigenerational household. Over at Pickle Cottage, Stacey continues to upgrade her home gym

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencers latest mission takes them to Sussex, where they help to solve two different house-hunting problems. Ashlee Newton has been saving for nine years to buy her first home, and is looking for a period flat near the bars and restaurants of Brighton or Hove. Colin Amery and Robin Balance are getting ready to move in together for the first time, and want to find a property they can renovate from scratch - which means they are paying particular attention to architectural details

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Its a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad Bar
programme.desc: Robin Colcord turns up flat broke, having lost his multi-billion-dollar fortune, but Rebecca assumes he is only feigning poverty in a bid to test her love for him. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and Roger Rees

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla is horrified to learn daughter Serafina is getting married and wants her father to walk down the aisle at her side. Comedy, guest starring Leah Remini, with Rhea Perlman and Josh Lozoff

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Is There a Doctor in the Howe?
programme.desc: Part one of two. The gang rallies round to help a distraught Frasier cope with the news that Lilith wants a divorce, and Rebecca helps take his mind off it a little more than most. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy and persuades Ray to accompany him to meet her parents - who prove far from amenable to the idea. Comedy, starring Monica Horn, Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles throw a singles party, where theyre both attracted to the same woman. However, before either of them can make a move, Roz steals the show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A broken Swiss watch, car trouble, a birthday surprise and a party thrown by Niless latest lover all combine to ruin Frasiers chances of romance with an attractive new acquaintance. With Kelsey Grammer and Lisa Waltz

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist is outraged when Kenny orders him to read adverts for a new sponsor on air, and rallies his fellow presenters to stage a protest. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist experiences a range of emotions including denial, anger and depression, as he struggles to cope with the pressures of unemployment. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits more struggling restaurants across America. In New Orleans, Gordon helps Kindred, a vegan restaurant grappling with delusion, disorganisation, a hoarder owner and a cook from hell

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Wokingham in Berkshire to meet professional gardener Mark whose barns are brimful of bikes, bric-a-brac and baggage

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The ancient meadows get some new inhabitants when the family take delivery of some new beehives, while Matt prepares for lambing season and selects a ram with help from mum Janice. Billy the vet returns to check on the puppies before they leave for their forever homes, and the family reflects on the positive changes they have made since Janices accident

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Jan and her son Jordan in their search to find a holiday home near La Duquesa on the Costa del Sol, for her maximum budget of £130,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, a supercar weekend brings supersized problems for restaurateurs Aggi and Camille. In Spain, a night on the tiles proves too much for holiday hosts Daniel and John, and theres a lot at stake for rookie bakers Rachael and Lee

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Drayton in Somerset, where Jordan and Robin host at their country pub, The Drayton Crown. One guest has already voiced their concerns about sleeping in a pub, so Jordan and Robin have their work cut out to change opinions. On first inspections, it doesnt look like theyll be successful but, following a visit to an aviation museum, will their chances in the competition take flight with a barnstorming breakfast?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, tech entrepreneur Shane, is hoping to wow his guests with a menu that draws on his Jamaican heritage and also his love of high-end restaurants. The night starts with strong gin martinis and a starter of scallops in a rich sauce, which blows his guests away with clean plates all round. Michaela surprises everyone with her love of golf, and Shanes main course of Jamaican style short rib is another triumph. But theres trouble in the air when Daves portrait of Martina is not well received and their simmering tension threatens to boil over

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Jean Johansson is back in the countryside near Tomar in central Portugal with Alison and Mike, who she helped find their dream home for their £116,000. Three years on, Jeans blown away by the changes theyve made to Casa Rosa and catches up with them to see how their lives have changed. Meanwhile, Ben Hillman heads back to Torrevieja on Spains Costa Blanca to catch up with Whithney and Rose at their holiday home that he secured them for their £90,000. A place in Los Altos took their search to dizzy new heights, but Punta Prima took the top spot. Two years later, Ben sees how theyre getting on and the changes theyve made to their perfect place

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Jack Middleton, Scottish National Party candidate for Aberdeen Central, discusses the partys view that the Energy Profits Levy harms Scotlands energy industry

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Keith and Kate decided to up sticks with their children from their home in Glasgow and move to Dunoon on the Firth of Clyde where theyre turning a castle-like tower built in 1878, that has been both a house and a hotel, into their dream home

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emma hasnt been seen for six months. After Edwins betrayal, shes started a new life as a well-spoken shop assistant in the bustling market town of Armley, preparing for the arrival of her baby and working tirelessly to save a maternity fund while worrying about how to provide for her child as a single mother. Back at Fairley Hall, Edwins new fiancee, Priya notices his heartache, while Adeles condition worsens. In the 1970s, Emma confronts her eldest daughter, Edwina, the ringleader of the coup against her, and is heartbroken to discover her protegee granddaughter Paulas secret romance with Jim Fairley

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat Kaeden, a 16-year-old battling a serious childhood illness, who has been rushed in after developing a fever at home. His mother describes her sons struggle with acute lymphoblastic leukaemia. Other patients include an aspiring pilot who has come off his motorbike during a track race and a man who has partially amputated his thumb

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cameras capture daily life at from Queens Medical Centre, Nottingham, one of the busiest AandE departments in Europe. Thirty seven-year-old Ronalds is brought in after slicing through his ankle with an angle grinder. As surgeons work to save his leg, Ronalds speaks of his life as a child in Latvia and the challenges he faced when starting a new life in the UK. Doctors make a shocking discovery after 50-year-old Jeremy suffers a crash on his mountain bike and 21-year-old Owen receives help after dislocated his shoulder at a music festival

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Experts sift through homes crammed with potential treasure to unearth prized items that could raise life-changing sums of cash. The first episode features Simon and Adity, who quit their city jobs to take on Simons family home - a 700-year-old castle in Scotland. Theyve called in the experts to raise cash from the propertys vast collection of antiques, manuscripts and paintings

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Richard Ayoade and Michelle Wolf for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Spring
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates the bounty of the spring garden and kitchen by picking some asparagus spears and cooking them wrapped in smoky bacon, served with sustainably sourced red mullet, scallops, squid and sea bass. Back in the garden, Jamie plants some tomato plants and demonstrates how to naturally deter pests with some companion planting. Jamie cooks up a spring greens ravioli, uses some spring onions in his version of an aromatic spicy green chicken curry and shows how to grow some unusual crops out of shop-bought vegetables. Finally, he gives purple sprouting broccoli an Italian-inspired makeover on a pizza with Cumberland sausage and a quick and easy tomato sauce

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a one-pan salmon pie

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey brings her DIY skills and design know-how to the Forest of Dean to help couple Katie and Chris, who are too scared to get started on renovating their first home. Having lost their confidence following an early bad experience with tradespeople, their vision of transforming the kitchen and dining room of their dated semi into a quirky, colourful space is on hold. Stacey encourages them to face their demons and get stuck in, showing them how to tackle some ambitious jobs. But Katie and Chris have just £15,000 to spend, so Stacey is going to need some clever design solutions to bring their build in on budget. At Pickle Cottage, Stacey takes on another equally ambitious project: upgrading an indoor-outdoor space beside the swimming pool

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with two couples who wanted to buy property in Devon. Newlyweds Sam and Jamie needed Kirsties help to put a difficult few years behind them, while Geoff and Sharon were making the move to nearby Torquay and hoped to find a home big enough for them, their children and Sharons mother

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: The Bar Manager, the Shrink, His Wife and Her Lover
programme.desc: Part two of two. Frasiers evening with Rebecca is thrown into disarray by the unscheduled appearance of Liliths crazed lover, who turns up looking for a showdown. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Kirstie Alley and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam leaves the bar in the capable hands of the former owner and sets off for a drive-in movie with friends, determined to recapture the heady days of his youth. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars VII: The Naked Prey
programme.desc: Sam loses a St Patricks Day bet with Garys Olde Towne Tavern about which bar can bank the most takings, and brings in his secret weapon - conman Harry the Hat - to even the score. Starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reluctantly agrees to do charity work at a hospital, but proves so popular with the patients that he starts spending more time with them than at home - much to wife Debras dismay. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amys mother and father turn up unexpectedly, intending to take their daughter back home with them. They are less than happy to find Ray there, let alone his parents, and the atmosphere is tense as the families take an instant dislike to each other

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy puts Robert in charge of writing invitations to their forthcoming wedding, but he tries to evade responsibility by seeking advice from Ray and Frank. They tell him his best bet is to make an appalling mess of the job so she will have to do it all herself. With Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An invitation to a school reunion drops through Frasiers door - but he is reluctant to attend because he believes the five-yearly event always coincides with a disastrous downturn in his fortunes. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Natalie and Tom from Yorkshire arrive at the retreat wanting to spice up their 12-year relationship. Their mismatched sexual histories mean that Natalie arrives with a confidence that Tom might be unable to match. After a flirtatious evening leads to steamy intimacy in the hot tub with residents Josh and Holly, the couple are left questioning everything. Meanwhile, Chanice and Richardo invite 15 of the residents upstairs for an orgy, though being in a room with so many people having sex proves overwhelming for Richardo, so a once-in-a-lifetime experience seems set to pass the couple by

programme.title: Confessions of a Cam Girl
programme.desc: Part one of two. The stories of five women selling explicit videos online. The market has exploded since lockdown, leaving them struggling to find a niche among their competitors. Maya uses her earnings to support her family financially, but is feeling burned out by the pressure to produce as much content as possible, while Sarah has been invited to attend her first-ever photoshoot in Marbella

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Richard Ayoade and Michelle Wolf for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks one-pan recipes that offer the perfect solutions for busy lives. Here he makes a dukkah roast lamb feast with a tip to speed up cooking

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Jo and Darryl in Devon are in desperate need of help after building inspectors condemned £127,000 worth of work on their sea-view home, leaving them with just £30,000 to start all over again. Stacey shows them how to make the most of their money by taking on jobs themselves including fitting their own kitchen and flooring

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help key-workers with modest budgets who want to buy their first homes in London. Civil partners Jo Hendle and Ally Macdonald have high expectations, having rented in Belsize Park, but to make the most of their £200,000 budget they need to move away from the expensive north of the capital to the more affordable south. Meanwhile, Liverpudlian Jennifer Dean hopes that £209,000 will buy her a two-bedroom period property in the south of the capital, with outside space for her cats

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam has second thoughts about selling his beloved car and goes as far as romancing the buyers widow to get it back. Meanwhile, Rebecca befriends a pig destined to be Woodys dinner. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasiers 21-year-old secretary invites him to Sunday lunch - but it is not quite the romantic tete-a-tete he was hoping for. Meanwhile, Cliff and Norm video a family reunion dinner at the bar - only to realise there is no tape in the camera

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm faces a potentially embarrassing encounter with the tax authorities, but uses his charm to beguile the attractive female inspector, while Sam panics when the regulars try to watch one of his old baseball games on a classic sports channel. Comedy, starring George Wendt and Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray lies to Debra, pretending he has bought her something extra special for Christmas - then has to seek Roberts advice to choose a gift that lives up to his extravagant claims. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank blithely starts helping himself to the snacks on sale in a local supermarket - much to the anger of the manager, who wastes no time in confronting him. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, with Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bulldog takes all the credit for saving Roz during a hold-up. However, it is not long before his new-found fame sends Frasier mad with frustration. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Dan Butler

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist dates a beautiful woman, but drives everyone crazy when he begins to feel insecure about his own looks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to ask Daphne for a date but she misunderstands his intentions, and Frasier has a frustrating episode of his own. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The number of large noses in Ricks family causes concern for Roz as she thinks about what her baby will look like. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay tries to revamp Voleos Seafood Restaurant, a second-generation family-run restaurant in Westwego, Louisiana. Its been struggling to stay open after the ruin left by Hurricane Ida back in 2021, which forced a relocation to a less ideal spot. With money running low, can Gordon turn their fortunes around?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel to Surrey to meet upcycler Rob, who has a range of sheds a few miles from Gatwick Airport

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt reveals his plan for increasing biodiversity in the woodland and planting the apple tree orchard that his parents Mike and Janice have always dreamed of. Farrier John pays the donkeys a visit and is surprised to find them living next to an unexpected new neighbour, and Matt visits the garage to see whether theyve had any luck getting dad his dads old Dodge up and running

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi looks for a holiday home near the popular Lanzarote resort of Puerto del Carmen, finding five potential properties on a budget of £140,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, there are opening day worries for restaurateurs Aggi and Camille. In Italy, theres a tight turnaround for rookie holiday hosts Angie and Ash. In Portugal, Harriet and Mondo branch out into events. And in Spain, couple Rachael and Lee from the Midlands bid to earn a crust at a pork pie shop

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon and Vanessa throw open the doors of the Angove Guest House in Weymouth, where the decor is delightful and the views are even more so. But for one guest, the highlight proves to be some proper milk in the fridge

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Night three in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire sees Martina serve up various Thai curries and poached pears. However, Shane will be looking for exactly the right level of spice and heat, and to make matters worse, Michaela isnt a huge fan of curry or fruit at all

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Danni Menzies returns to the coastal town of Denia on Spains Costa Blanca to check in on Alison, Brian and their dogs. Jasmine Harman heads back to the sun-kissed shores of Kapparis for a catch-up with Bill and Sandra

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Claire Coutinho MP, Shadow Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero, sets out the Conservative Partys Cheap Power Plan

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp help clothing designer Lexie and IT consultant Ed from Nottingham decide whether to renovate their four-bed one-bathroom house or sell it and move elsewhere. Ed votes for packing up and moving to a bigger place for their family of six while Lexie thinks with Kirsties help they can make their home work for them

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: In the 1970s, business mogul Emma Harte reflects on her childrens betrayal and her past entanglements with the Fairleys, taking the story back to the 1910s. With Edwin having been sent away, Emma uses her knowledge of the Fairley family to get ahead in the household. But when her friend Mac announces he is leaving, she spies an opportunity to escape too. Meanwhile, Adeles sobriety rekindles her marriage with Adam, leading to upset when he loses interest in Olivia

programme.title: The Push: Murder on the Cliff
programme.desc: Part one of two. Scotlands leading legal team tackle the death of Leeds-based lawyer Fawziyah Javed, who fell from the top of Arthurs Seat in Edinburgh, dying alone with no witnesses far from home. Hours later, Kashif Anwar, her husband of nine months was arrested for murder. Exclusive access to the murder trial at Edinburghs High Court finds the jury being shown CCTV of the couple walking arm-in-arm, and a smiling selfie taken minutes before Fawziyah falls. What dark secrets could lie behind their outward happiness?

programme.title: The Push: Murder on the Cliff
programme.desc: Part two of two. Access to the murder trial at Edinburgh High Court, including the testimony of the person to find Fawziyah after she fell from Arthurs Seat. The jury discovers that at this point Fawziyah was still alive and gave a dying declaration of what had just happened. But its still a case without forensics - and two totally different versions of what occurred

programme.title: Berlin (2023)
programme.desc: Spy thriller from director and writer Atul Sabharwal. When Ashok Kumar - who is deaf and mute - is accused of spying for a foreign power, sign-language translator Pushkin Verma is brought in for the interrogation. But as the case proceeds, the mystery deepens, and Pushkin finds himself caught up in a complicated and dangerous game between rival intelligence agencies in India. Starring Ishwak Singh, Rahul Bose and Nitesh Pandey. In Hindi

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a gnarly chicken pie

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Stacey helps a father and daughter in Suffolk whose hopes for a fresh start after a bereavement were dashed when building work went badly wrong, leaving them tens of thousands of pounds out of pocket. To make their remaining budget go further, Stacey helps them to rethink the design of their home and teaches them how to do jobs themselves to save even more money, including switching out windows for doors and fitting out their own fireplace. Stacey also gives the pair design tips inspired by a cosy industrial aesthetic thats perfect for their multigenerational household. Over at Pickle Cottage, Stacey continues to upgrade her home gym

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencers latest mission takes them to Sussex, where they help to solve two different house-hunting problems. Ashlee Newton has been saving for nine years to buy her first home, and is looking for a period flat near the bars and restaurants of Brighton or Hove. Colin Amery and Robin Balance are getting ready to move in together for the first time, and want to find a property they can renovate from scratch - which means they are paying particular attention to architectural details

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Its a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad Bar
programme.desc: Robin Colcord turns up flat broke, having lost his multi-billion-dollar fortune, but Rebecca assumes he is only feigning poverty in a bid to test her love for him. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and Roger Rees

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla is horrified to learn daughter Serafina is getting married and wants her father to walk down the aisle at her side. Comedy, guest starring Leah Remini, with Rhea Perlman and Josh Lozoff

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Is There a Doctor in the Howe?
programme.desc: Part one of two. The gang rallies round to help a distraught Frasier cope with the news that Lilith wants a divorce, and Rebecca helps take his mind off it a little more than most. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy and persuades Ray to accompany him to meet her parents - who prove far from amenable to the idea. Comedy, starring Monica Horn, Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles throw a singles party, where theyre both attracted to the same woman. However, before either of them can make a move, Roz steals the show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A broken Swiss watch, car trouble, a birthday surprise and a party thrown by Niless latest lover all combine to ruin Frasiers chances of romance with an attractive new acquaintance. With Kelsey Grammer and Lisa Waltz

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist is outraged when Kenny orders him to read adverts for a new sponsor on air, and rallies his fellow presenters to stage a protest. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist experiences a range of emotions including denial, anger and depression, as he struggles to cope with the pressures of unemployment. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits more struggling restaurants across America. In New Orleans, Gordon helps Kindred, a vegan restaurant grappling with delusion, disorganisation, a hoarder owner and a cook from hell

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Wokingham in Berkshire to meet professional gardener Mark whose barns are brimful of bikes, bric-a-brac and baggage

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The ancient meadows get some new inhabitants when the family take delivery of some new beehives, while Matt prepares for lambing season and selects a ram with help from mum Janice. Billy the vet returns to check on the puppies before they leave for their forever homes, and the family reflects on the positive changes they have made since Janices accident

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Jan and her son Jordan in their search to find a holiday home near La Duquesa on the Costa del Sol, for her maximum budget of £130,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, a supercar weekend brings supersized problems for restaurateurs Aggi and Camille. In Spain, a night on the tiles proves too much for holiday hosts Daniel and John, and theres a lot at stake for rookie bakers Rachael and Lee

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Drayton in Somerset, where Jordan and Robin host at their country pub, The Drayton Crown. One guest has already voiced their concerns about sleeping in a pub, so Jordan and Robin have their work cut out to change opinions. On first inspections, it doesnt look like theyll be successful but, following a visit to an aviation museum, will their chances in the competition take flight with a barnstorming breakfast?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, tech entrepreneur Shane, is hoping to wow his guests with a menu that draws on his Jamaican heritage and also his love of high-end restaurants. The night starts with strong gin martinis and a starter of scallops in a rich sauce, which blows his guests away with clean plates all round. Michaela surprises everyone with her love of golf, and Shanes main course of Jamaican style short rib is another triumph. programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. Single mum Tracy from Bedfordshire has been out of the dating game since she split with her fiancee three years ago and hopes to find a man who matches her adventurous side, while London sales adviser Matthew, 24, is tired of dating apps and thinks online profiles mean girls never actually see the real him. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.desc: The armchair critics get in Eurovision mood as they sit down for the annual song contest. They also watch spy thriller Citadel, new dating show I Kissed a Boy, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, as well as The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes and The Big Celebrity Detox. First shown in May 2023

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After weeks of honeymoons filled with love, laughter and tonnes of tiffs, the couples return from paradise to face the first dinner party

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is referred to a therapist who is affected so deeply by the experience that she too is soon in need of treatment. programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of leading comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: The duo decide a night on the town is in order and find themselves getting acquainted with a teenage goth at Lazerbowl. Jeremy perseveres with Toni, despite her love for Peter Gabriel, and Mark discovers a melon has more merits than a bowling ball

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark makes a new friend at a business conference and Jeremy reluctantly considers accepting Super Hans as a replacement flatmate - but soon decides against it. Offbeat comedy, starring Robert Webb, Olivia Coleman and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover Williams cover after he betrayed his furry friends in ink. Sketch applies a new tattoo on Jules, whos branded with the palm-print of her ex. Jay goes to work on his namesake, covering a loony toon depicting a very bad dog. Stacey wants to hide the abomination that was supposed to represent her love for her newborn, while Emma needs to disguise her tattooed equations after her attempts to impress her maths teacher didnt add up to much

programme.title: Taskmaster: Champion of Champions
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe, Katherine Ryan, Noel Fielding, Rob Beckett and Bob Mortimer return for more consensual indignity at the hands of Greg Davies and Alex Horne

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of leading comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven Newman, CEO of department store chain Loehmanns, views his company from a different perspective when he goes undercover as an aspiring entrepreneur visiting the shops after winning a reality TV contest. And thats when he learns first-hand that the employees are the foundation of the company

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, the Chairwoman of Donatos Pizza and daughter of the companys founder, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win money to open her own restaurant. Her aim is to uncover where the company is going, what plans for the future should include and whether her fathers values are still being upheld

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples in Essex and east London compete in the dinner-party challenge, beginning with Spencer and Saras simple Jewish feast. Reserved pair Lauren and Jack prepare a sophisticated menu reflecting the hosts heritage in South Africa and Burma. For the final dinner, Paul and Ed opt for a flavourful fare that proves a bit much for those with a fondness for plainer food, and with the contest over, the competitors anxiously wait to discover which party was considered the best

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ben and Ambika kick off the competition in Hertfordshire with a south-east Asian menu. Their guests are Sinead from Northern Ireland and her prank-loving partner Tony, and competitive couple Kally and Mark. The lads bond over football, and by the end of the night Tony has played a prank or two setting the tone for the week. Subsequently, Kally and Mark put on an Anglo-Indian menu, but things soon get heated in the kitchen. Then, Tony and Sinead serve up an Irish menu, with silly dances, silly jokes and silly accents. However, it remains to be seen which couple will pocket the prize for best soiree

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics get in Eurovision mood as they sit down for the annual song contest. They also watch spy thriller Citadel, new dating show I Kissed a Boy, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, as well as The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes and The Big Celebrity Detox. programme.desc: Bart is referred to a therapist who is affected so deeply by the experience that she too is soon in need of treatment. programme.desc: Lucas has a tough decision to make in order to protect himself from a dangerous cellmate. Elsewhere, Warren is determined to uncover the truth from someone, no matter the cost.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dating show in which singletons meet up with potential partners at a restaurant, having selected them based solely on an internet photograph. Linguist Louis is struggling to learn the language of love, and within seconds of meeting Adela, his nerves takes hold and silence descends on the table. Meanwhile, Michael and Karina share their experiences of parenthood, and writer Louis seems more concerned with the price of the meal as he meets spiritual barmaid Amber

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. programme.title: The Simpsons

First through the doors is Anna, who has a lengthy list of what she wants from her perfect man, Will her date Liam tick all the boxes? Linguist Louis is struggling to learn the language of love, and within seconds of meeting Adela, his nerves takes hold and silence descends on the table. Meanwhile, Michael and Karina share their experiences of parenthood, and writer Louis seems more concerned with the price of the meal as he meets spiritual barmaid Amber

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now hes ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The newly-weds move in together and face tasks designed to make them more honest with each other. But honesty isnt always the best policy

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Casualty, Queer Eye, Below Deck Sailing Yacht, Alexander Armstrong in Sri Lanka, FUBAR, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Big Beasts and BBC News

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: This Is This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: The Dropouts are over the moon when they are booked to perform a gig at a charity carnival, and Adam takes the opportunity to make his very first rockumentary. Meanwhile, Beverlys concerns about Murrays health push him to the limit

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Having become obsessed with game shows since leaving college, Erica decides to apply to appear on TV quiz Jeopardy! A new crush makes Barry realise that he might not be quite over Lainey yet

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2018, groom Lee hedged his bets on a wedding in a maze for bride Becky. Now, the pair are back - along with best man Shane and bridesmaid Lisa - to discuss their big day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires newfound positivity leads her to inadvertently approve of Lukes new relationship with someone from work, while Phil gets a shock when he surprises Alex at school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylans plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesnt go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try to get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Adam decides to see the movie Willow instead of spending Mothers Day with Beverly, he must find a way to get back into her good graces. Barry is tired of his status as middle child and fights Erica for his right to the college of his choice

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam unintentionally lets it slip that Barry never completed his community service requirement. Erica makes plans for her and Geoff to follow The Grateful Dead all summer, while Barry and his friends graduate from high school.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the American comedy following the lives of three branches of an extended family, featuring Jay, a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, and gay couple Mitchell and Cam, who are getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to teach his son a lesson in responsibility by stealing his unlocked bike - but ends up taking the wrong one. Elsewhere, Mitchell and Cameron decide to introduce Lily to other children and arrange a play date, while Jay tries to bond with Manny

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The newly-weds move in together and face tasks designed to make them more honest with each other. But honesty isnt always the best policy

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Big Narsties unlucky in love cousin goes on a date with an office manager whose online confidence does not extend to real life. An 83-year-old former pin-up model seeks a man who can keep up with her hectic lifestyle and loves long walks - a date with his own personal trainer may just be what she needs. A midwife hoping to have children of her own dates a former strongman, and two men with a love of dancing bond over their matching outfits

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his sons entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesakes magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Ice-Cream of Margie (With the Light Blue Hair)
programme.desc: Homer is fired from the power plant and secures a job as an ice-cream man, but gets so wrapped up in his new career that he puts his marriage in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Marge discovers a new skill as an expert sculptor, using an unusual medium - lollipop sticks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes Nelsons best friend and revels in the protection his new status brings. Unfortunately, the situation means he is unable to see Milhouse - forcing the pair to meet in secret. Meanwhile, Homer becomes addicted to one of Lisas fantasy books

programme.desc: Brazilian football legend Ronaldo visits the town to advise Homer on refereeing Little League matches, while Marge reacts to accusations of technophobia by purchasing a PC - and soon becomes hooked on a game involving a virtual Springfield being terrorised by Bart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart receives a lot of negative attention from Springfield residents when he costs the Isotots baseball team the Little League championship. programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: The bikers ride across the Balearic islands Menorca and Majorca, sampling great produce and finding out about the British influence in the Mediterranean from the 17th century to the present day. They reveal how mayonnaise was invented in Menorcas capital of Mahon, sample Menorcan gin, and meet British chef Mark Fosh, who has lived in Majorca for more than 20 years. Recipes include cuttlefish stew and squid salad with mayonnaise, fish and chips in gin and tonic batter, and sea bass a la mallorquina and saffron potato puree

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares recipes that children can enjoy that are quick and easy to prepare, including waffle fry sliders and parmesan fish sticks

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes quick and easy one-pan meals. Dishes include sheet pan curried chicken and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and his friend, mentor and fellow chef Gennaro Contaldo explore traditional Italian home cooking, beginning by visiting the Aeolian Islands to track down undiscovered recipes untouched by time. Ninety-three-year-old caper farmer Franchina teaches Jamie how to cook stuffed squid, inspiring his grilled squid and zingy caper salsa. He also cooks Sunday lunch with the matriarch of one of the archipelagos biggest families, with the menu featuring chicken and aubergine pot roast with lemony couscous

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo head to Puglia to seek out the family recipes that make this region one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, inspiring an authentic hand-crafted pasta with warm broccoli and tangy cheese pesto. In the streets of a whitewashed hill town, Jamie discovers Italys answer to paella, before cooking up a showstopping seafood stew with chunky bread and garlic aioli. Also on the menu is orecchiette with aubergine, courgette and black chickpeas, and orecchiette with fresh broad beans, baby tomatoes, basil and aged ricotta

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina throws Jeffrey a surprise birthday party. On the menu for the celebration is a Greek platter, spinach pie and a delicious raspberry and orange trifle

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina begins working on an article about brunch and asks for help from her friends such as a local florist who creates a flower display to go on the table

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the 11 remaining contestants dessert-making skills, beginning with a signature trifle combining biscuit, cake, jelly or custard in distinct layers. The technical challenge involves creating floating islands of meringues on creme anglaise, and the contenders must prepare 24 petits fours for the showstopper. Plus, presenter Mel Giedroyc explores the origins of the trifle and discovers how it was transformed in the Georgian era from an elitist treat for the aristocracy to a dish that was accessible to the masses

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess how the remaining contestants cope with making pies and tarts. They begin with signature double-crusted fruit pies, make custard tarts in the technical challenge and finish by creating pies made with filo pastry for the showstopper. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The celebrated chef arrives in the Dordogne, famous for its traditional hearty cuisine, buried treasures and a love of all things duck. Exploring the region, James tastes three local specialities all cooked for him by the Auberge owner, British ex-pat Chris. After lunch, Chris hunts for another local icon, the black truffle, which he intends to use in his next recipe

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Lyon, where the famous food market provides plenty of inspiration for a Lyonnaise bacon salad, before he visits one of the citys many Michelin-starred restaurants to experience some fine dining. In his own kitchen, James shows how to make one of Frances best-known desserts - creme brulee

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the culinary delights of southern Spain, travelling from Valencia to Torremolinos and finding out about the influence of the Moors, who invaded the country in the early eighth century. Along the way, they visit one of the most fertile areas in Spain, get their hands on a freshly caught octopus, go for a mud bath and learn about flamenco, giving Dave a chance to show off his dance moves. Finally, they cook tapas for the San Juan midsummer night festival, where they reflect upon their entire Mediterranean adventure

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts together a tasty ranch-style cookout. Dishes include Caribbean burgers with mango slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond prepares four quick and easy chicken dinners. Her creations include peanut chicken pasta and chicken nugget bacon ranch club

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo head to Naples to seek out the family recipes the locals love to eat, discovering a street snack that is said to predate the modern pizza, before giving a foolproof guide to making the ultimate one at home. On the island of Procida, Jamie is blown away by sensational seafood dishes inspiring him to make a fish poached in crazy water., while there are recipes for a classic margherita and sausage and broccoli pizza, as well as tuna, courgette and crushed almond spaghetti

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo head off the beaten track to the little-known region of Basilicata in search of old-school Italian recipes, meeting a family of shepherds who still cook as their ancestors did hundreds of years ago. Jamie gives a Sunday roast an Italian spin with his leg of lamb with herby stuffing and roast potatoes with sticky onions, before being put through his paces by an 89-year-old macaroni master and cooking up a simple spicy sausage and sweet pepper pasta

programme.desc: Ina Garten plays both teacher and student but begins with a cookery class where she demonstrates a recipe for banana cake and blueberry muffins

programme.desc: A nursery-inspired menu, including truffle popcorn followed by spicy turkey meatballs

programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess how the remaining contestants cope with preparing biscuits and traybakes. The signature challenge throws up a variety of bakewells, banoffees and brownies, while French classic tuiles are the order of the day in the technical test. Finally, the bakers construct biscuit towers, but who will crumble under the pressure of the showstopper?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining contestants face three tasks involving sweet dough and begin by making signature tea loaves, presenting judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood with everything from a Devonshire-inspired panettone to Welsh bara brith. They also face one of Pauls most fiendish technical challenges yet and must create 36 sweet European buns in the showstopper round. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The celebrated chef arrives in the south-eastern town of Annecy, where he wanders around its market to select ingredients for his first cook. He then visits award-winning pastry chef Philippe Rigollot to sample some of his extraordinary creations

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: The bikers ride across the Balearic islands Menorca and Majorca, sampling great produce and finding out about the British influence in the Mediterranean from the 17th century to the present day. They reveal how mayonnaise was invented in Menorcas capital of Mahon, sample Menorcan gin, and meet British chef Mark Fosh, who has lived in Majorca for more than 20 years. Recipes include cuttlefish stew and squid salad with mayonnaise, fish and chips in gin and tonic batter, and sea bass a la mallorquina and saffron potato puree

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares recipes that children can enjoy that are quick and easy to prepare, including waffle fry sliders and parmesan fish sticks

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes quick and easy one-pan meals. Dishes include sheet pan curried chicken and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and his friend, mentor and fellow chef Gennaro Contaldo explore traditional Italian home cooking, beginning by visiting the Aeolian Islands to track down undiscovered recipes untouched by time. Ninety-three-year-old caper farmer Franchina teaches Jamie how to cook stuffed squid, inspiring his grilled squid and zingy caper salsa. He also cooks Sunday lunch with the matriarch of one of the archipelagos biggest families, with the menu featuring chicken and aubergine pot roast with lemony couscous

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo head to Puglia to seek out the family recipes that make this region one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, inspiring an authentic hand-crafted pasta with warm broccoli and tangy cheese pesto. In the streets of a whitewashed hill town, Jamie discovers Italys answer to paella, before cooking up a showstopping seafood stew with chunky bread and garlic aioli. Also on the menu is orecchiette with aubergine, courgette and black chickpeas, and orecchiette with fresh broad beans, baby tomatoes, basil and aged ricotta

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina throws Jeffrey a surprise birthday party. On the menu for the celebration is a Greek platter, spinach pie and a delicious raspberry and orange trifle

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina begins working on an article about brunch and asks for help from her friends such as a local florist who creates a flower display to go on the table

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the 11 remaining contestants dessert-making skills, beginning with a signature trifle combining biscuit, cake, jelly or custard in distinct layers. The technical challenge involves creating floating islands of meringues on creme anglaise, and the contenders must prepare 24 petits fours for the showstopper. Plus, presenter Mel Giedroyc explores the origins of the trifle and discovers how it was transformed in the Georgian era from an elitist treat for the aristocracy to a dish that was accessible to the masses

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess how the remaining contestants cope with making pies and tarts. They begin with signature double-crusted fruit pies, make custard tarts in the technical challenge and finish by creating pies made with filo pastry for the showstopper. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The celebrated chef arrives in the Dordogne, famous for its traditional hearty cuisine, buried treasures and a love of all things duck. Exploring the region, James tastes three local specialities all cooked for him by the Auberge owner, British ex-pat Chris. After lunch, Chris hunts for another local icon, the black truffle, which he intends to use in his next recipe

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to Lyon, where the famous food market provides plenty of inspiration for a Lyonnaise bacon salad, before he visits one of the citys many Michelin-starred restaurants to experience some fine dining. In his own kitchen, James shows how to make one of Frances best-known desserts - creme brulee

programme.desc: Paul looks back over his incredible journey into the baking heritage of some of the worlds most famous cities, and showcases some favourite recipes inspired by his visits

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the culinary delights of southern Spain, travelling from Valencia to Torremolinos and finding out about the influence of the Moors, who invaded the country in the early eighth century. Along the way, they visit one of the most fertile areas in Spain, get their hands on a freshly caught octopus, go for a mud bath and learn about flamenco, giving Dave a chance to show off his dance moves. Finally, they cook tapas for the San Juan midsummer night festival, where they reflect upon their entire Mediterranean adventure

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts together a tasty ranch-style cookout. Dishes include Caribbean burgers with mango slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond prepares four quick and easy chicken dinners. Her creations include peanut chicken pasta and chicken nugget bacon ranch club

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo head to Naples to seek out the family recipes the locals love to eat, discovering a street snack that is said to predate the modern pizza, before giving a foolproof guide to making the ultimate one at home. On the island of Procida, Jamie is blown away by sensational seafood dishes inspiring him to make a fish poached in crazy water., while there are recipes for a classic margherita and sausage and broccoli pizza, as well as tuna, courgette and crushed almond spaghetti

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Gennaro Contaldo head off the beaten track to the little-known region of Basilicata in search of old-school Italian recipes, meeting a family of shepherds who still cook as their ancestors did hundreds of years ago. Jamie gives a Sunday roast an Italian spin with his leg of lamb with herby stuffing and roast potatoes with sticky onions, before being put through his paces by an 89-year-old macaroni master and cooking up a simple spicy sausage and sweet pepper pasta

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Christmas comes around, all the Ingalls are caught up in the secrecy and excitement. Charles and Mary take secret jobs to obtain a gift for their loved ones. While she succeeds in making the Christmas a memorable experience for everybody by selling her beloved horse Bunny to Nels Oleson so she can buy Ma a stove. Carrie remembers the true meaning of Christmas

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nels Oleson has had it up to here with Harriets snobbish, meddlesome behaviour, particularly toward the Ingalls family. Mrs Oleson doesnt take kindly to her husbands old-school beliefs, either. The two get into a huge argument and decide to separate. This sends the Ingalls and the Olesons other friends to intervene and convince them to settle their differences

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John and Olivia realise their children are growing up, and that this Christmas may be the last with the whole family. However, a series of disasters threatens to keep them apart

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A charismatic newcomer challenges the sheriff in an election, while Grandpa tries to have a captured wild horse set free

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: Quigley is all set to open his new golf course with a tournament, but does not count on Mickeys attempts to fix the event. Danny leaves for Dublin, to Seans outrage, and Niamh thinks Orla is smitten with her father. Irish rural drama, starring Tony Doyle and Colin Farrell

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Arthur discovers that Phylliss husband has arrived back on the scene and concocts all manner of ways to protect her from his charms. Meanwhile, Deborah is forced to make a difficult decision about a distant relatives unwanted baby. Medical drama, starring James Bolam and Michael French

programme.title: Doctor Finlay

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: The lawyer defends an stuttering, apparently mentally challenged petty crook. The youngest son of a criminal family, he now finds himself on the rather more serious charge of murder. Leo McKern stars

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The black market grips the 4077th, where two bottles of Scotch can buy secret surgery. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Mike Farrell

programme.title: M*A*S*H

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Potter writes home to mark a wedding anniversary, Frank and Hot Lips try to find him a suitable gift, only to be outdone by Radar. Alan Alda, Harry Morgan and Loretta Swit star

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob and Terry seek sanctuary from the news so they can watch TV highlights of an England v Bulgaria football match without knowing the result, but they are pursued by the relentless Flint, who has bet them they cannot escape the final score. James Bolam and Rodney Bewes star, with Brian Glover and Donald Gee

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: The ever-optimistic Bob tries to broaden Terrys social circle by inviting him to a trendy dinner party, but as usual his well-meaning efforts result in disaster. Rodney Bewes and James Bolam star as the original men behaving badly

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Thelma looks on with disapproval as Terry helps Bob move his most treasured possessions to his new house, releasing a flood of nostalgic memories about their youthful misadventures. Comedy, starring Rodney Bewes and James Bolam
