programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a minister cope with a crisis of conscience when his church insists on religion being taught in pre-school classes - to the outrage of parents

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker falls in love with Harriet Olesons visiting niece, but fears his age may ruin his chances of a happy relationship

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A typhus outbreak sweeps Walnut Grove and several people become critically ill. The Ingalls family is spared, but Charles is not so lucky when he is exposed. The church is set up as a makeshift hospital-morgue, while Charles, Doc Baker and Reverend Alden, all quarantined with the illness, search for the source of the disease

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A travelling medicine salesman arrives in town claiming to be able to heal anything, but he faces condemnation when Mrs Oleson becomes seriously ill. Red Buttons guest stars

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandma is outraged at having to share the job of playing the church organ, so threatens to change her religion, and Olivia decides she needs a new look

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Elizabeth has disturbing dreams and begins sleepwalking. John-Boy realises there is a connection between her nightmares and a childhood experience that she cannot remember

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: An ancient statue is uncovered at Dillons farm, which appears to have strange effects on the locals - but Kathleen remains singularly unimpressed. Light-hearted drama, starring Lorcan Cranitch and Aine Ni Mhuiri

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: BBC radio series Tiny Terry comes to town and Michael is convinced he can land the part when auditions are held for the lead role. Jean and Eddie come along for moral support, but theyre in for a surprise. Elsewhere, Helens first day as a trainee nurse is a testing time - not only do her father and matron prove to be a handful, but feisty patient Elizabeth Grimshaw is hallucinating and behaving erratically. James Bolam and Michael French star

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: Snowdrifts cut off Arden House on the night before Hogmanay, forcing Janet and the doctors to face a long evening huddled in front of a roaring fire. As the hours drag on, tempers wear thin and a few old scores are settled before the crowing cock heralds the dawn. Festive special of the Highland medical drama, starring David Rintoul, Ian Bannen, Jessica Turner and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.sub-title: Rumpole and the Man of God
programme.desc: The Old Bailey hack defends a vicar accused of stealing three shirts from a department store. However, the clergyman refuses to testify in his own behalf. Courtroom drama, starring Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Nurse Crattys orphanage is bombed and she brings her children to the 4077th. Frank accuses one of the orphans of stealing his newly awarded Purple Heart. Comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A wounded officer arrives at the 4077th and claims he is Christ, prompting Intelligence Officer Flagg and psychiatrist Sidney Freedman to grapple over his fate. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: BJ writes home about one of Franks routine foul-ups, and Father Mulcahy receives a visit from a formidable superior. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Mike Farrell

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The atmosphere is frantic as casualties flood into the station during the last days of the war, while Hawkeye is temporarily institutionalised due to a nervous breakdown. Feature-length finale of the comedy, starring Alan Alda, Mike Farrell and Loretta Swit

programme.title: Good News on GREAT!
programme.desc: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The atmosphere is frantic as casualties flood into the station during the last days of the war, while Hawkeye is temporarily institutionalised due to a nervous breakdown. Feature-length finale of the comedy, starring Alan Alda, Mike Farrell and Loretta Swit

programme.title: The New Avengers
programme.desc: A large number of civil servants, members of parliament and intelligence personnel are dying from apparently natural causes and with no link between them, until a doomed British agent mentions the angels of death. programme.title: The Avengers

programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Action thriller, starring Steven Seagal, Dmitry Chepovetsky, Igor Jijikine and Robert Wisden

programme.desc: A military unit attempting to find out what killed their predecessors find themselves trapped in a compound as strange events begin to take place. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Anne Heche and Dave Annable

programme.desc: Walker helps to free an elderly man who is falsely accused of a crime

programme.desc: Much to his colleagues amusement and BAs irritation, Murdock is revered as a god on a remote island where natives are being forced to mine diamonds by a gang of ruthless mercenaries. Action adventure, starring Dwight Schultz and George Peppard

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent organises a small band of associates who believe in his claims - but one of their meetings is disrupted by an alien attack. Starring Roy Thinnes, with Kent Smith and Carol Lynley

programme.desc: A comet smashes into the moon, causing devastating changes to tidal movements across the world. However, scientists discover this is only the beginning, as the entire structure of the moon is breaking apart, threatening all life on Earth - so a demolitions expert is sent to avert disaster. Sci-fi adventure, starring Stephen Baldwin, Dirk Benedict and Amy Price-Francis

programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing

programme.title: Legend Lowdown

programme.desc: A sailor races to reach a hoard of diamonds stowed on board a Dutch vessel that has sunk in the East Indies. However, the derelict ship lies close to an island inhabited by a fierce tribe with a deep mistrust of strangers, while a volcano is about to erupt at any moment. Seafaring adventure, with Fred MacMurray, Vera Ralston and Robert Douglas

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk endures a painful experiment set up by an alien race investigating human responses, testing his capacity for self-sacrifice in the face of seemingly certain doom. Classic sci-fi drama, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent captures an alien leader - but the creatures comrades come looking for it before he can show the authorities. Roy Thinnes stars, with Anthony Eisley and Karen Black

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trivette infiltrates the gang of a career criminal who is out on parole and back to his old ways, and Alex opens her rehabilitation centre to help steer youngsters away from crime

programme.title: Stealth (2005)
programme.desc: Three highly skilled fighter pilots are less than thrilled when a new computer with artificial intelligence is brought in to assist in flying a state-of-the-art jet. However, the trio are left to pick up the pieces when the machine is struck by lightning and begins to malfunction, leading to a chaotic battle to stop the jet from starting an all-out war. Action adventure, starring Jamie Foxx, Jessica Biel and Josh Lucas

programme.title: Push (2009)
programme.desc: American expat Nicks Gant lives in Hong Kong and is forced to hide his psychic abilities for fear of being tracked down by a sinister government agency that monitors and experiments on gifted individuals. When a 13-year-old clairvoyant tracks him down and asks for his help finding a fellow psychic, Nick emerges from hiding in the hope of stopping the agency once and for all. Sci-fi thriller, starring Chris Evans, Dakota Fanning, Djimon Hounsou and Camilla Belle

programme.title: Drive (2011)
programme.desc: A stuntman who moonlights as a getaway driver tries to protect the wife and child of an imprisoned criminal. Upon his release, the convict is forced to rob a pawnshop to pay off his gangland debts, with the driver offering his assistance. However, the job goes awry and the driver is drawn into a conflict with the Mafia. Crime drama, with Ryan Gosling, Carey Mulligan and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: A Reason to Live, A Reason to Die (1972)
programme.desc: During the American Civil War, a Union officer faces disgrace for handing over a fort to the Confederates. Determined to regain his honour, he rescues seven men condemned to death and offers them a stay of execution if they help him retake the fort. Spaghetti Western, starring James Coburn and Telly Savalas

When earthquakes open up a tectonic plate, the temperature rapidly falls, plunging the country into a new ice age and leaving the tourists battling to survive. Disaster movie, starring Barton Bund and Bailey Spry

programme.title: Mackennas Gold (1969)
programme.desc: A marshal is kidnapped by a criminal who believes the lawman knows the way to a legendary valley of gold. However, as they embark on their journey, they discover other parties are also seeking the treasure, which is located in hostile Apache territory. Western, starring Gregory Peck, Omar Sharif, Telly Savalas, Julie Newmar, Lee J Cobb and Eli Wallach

programme.title: Gunfighters (1947)
programme.desc: A gunslinger renounces his violent ways and vows never to kill again. Taking a job working for a wealthy land owner, he finds himself drawn into a plot to drive ranchers off their land, which leads him to question his pacifism. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Barbara Britton and Bruce Cabot

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: McCoy and Spock are thrown into a race against time to save Kirk from the spell of a beautiful alien. Meanwhile, matters are complicated further when a Klingon attack renders the Enterprise almost powerless. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Aliens plot to take over the nations news media, beginning with a publishing empire

programme.desc: The soldiers of fortune protect a girl being hunted by the KGB for top-secret documents relating to the Star Wars project. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An escaped convict goes on a killing spree, seeking revenge against those who put him away. Walker and Trivette race to stop him before he murders the trial judge who sentenced him

programme.desc: A Roman commander is posted to Britain in the last days of the empire and given a final mission to rescue a high-ranking official and his son stranded in the north. However, the endeavour reveals his true destiny is to lead the Britons against the new Saxon invasion, and marks the start of a legend. Historical adventure, starring Clive Owen, Keira Knightley, Ray Winstone, Ioan Gruffudd and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: Escape from New York (1981)
programme.desc: Former special forces soldier Snake Plissken is sentenced to life on Manhattan Island, an anarchic penal colony for the most dangerous criminals. When Air Force One is hijacked and crashes there, Snake is coerced into rescuing the US president from prisoners holding him hostage. John Carpenters sci-fi action adventure, with Kurt Russell, Donald Pleasence, Lee Van Cleef, Adrienne Barbeau and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: The Business (2005)
programme.desc: A criminal flees London in the 1980s to start a new life on the Costa del Sol. He is soon drawn into the inner circle of a British gangster living in exile, but his relationship with a psychotic crooks girlfriend threatens to bring his criminal career to an abrupt end. Crime drama, starring Danny Dyer, Tamer Hassan and Geoff Bell

programme.title: The Virginian (2014)
programme.desc: A boy is left an orphan following the murder of his parents, but is taken in by a cattle baron. The rancher trains the youngster to fight and teaches him to enforce a strong moral code, but as he grows to adulthood, he begins to realise his mentor has taken him in to serve a hidden agenda. Western, starring Trace Adkins, Ron Perlman and Victoria Pratt

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff at Kings College Hospital treat patients on Valentines Day, including a 53-year-old psychologist who has injured his shoulder in a motorcycle accident. His partner is abroad and he doesnt want to worry her, so he decides to keep the incident a secret. Also in the AandE department are a man with a bleed on the brain and an elderly widower who has been bitten by his dog

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Dorset, rain and storms threaten Mapperton Houses annual plant fair. In Staffordshire, the Cavenagh-Mainwaring family are dealing with leaks of their own at Whitmore Hall. Nova Guest is thrilled to sign off her summer season by inviting the first visitors in to the newly-restored Gunpowder Plot room at Ashby Manor, and at Chavenage in the Cotswolds, James and Emma are finally ready to open up their vaunted sauna project to guests

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 39-year-old man is flown to Londons Kings College Hospital after being involved in a head-on collision while driving a friends sports car, and doctors fear his injuries could leave him paralysed. Meanwhile, 21-year-old Thomassine requires treatment following a skateboarding accident and the staff see to Matias, 34, who has been dragged along a station platform by a moving train

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The staff at Kings College Hospital treat patients on Valentines Day, including a 53-year-old psychologist who has injured his shoulder in a motorcycle accident. His partner is abroad and he doesnt want to worry her, so he decides to keep the incident a secret. Also in the AandE department are a man with a bleed on the brain and an elderly widower who has been bitten by his dog

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: On the fourth day in Benidorm its the turn of Exauce, a barber from Glasgow who thinks he has the perfect formula for fun. However, taking the plunge with a day of cable water-skiing leaves some of his guests feeling exposed, and his next bid to win at a top-dollar luxury hotel may stretch his budget to breaking-point

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the turn of Charlotte Churchs parents James and Maria to play host at Dexby Townhouse in Cardiff, and they pull out all the stops by laying on a day of white-water rafting and a magic performance courtesy of their nephew Elliot. But the following morning, some of the guests are kept waiting for breakfast

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit a stately home in Somerset, where Simon is convinced he has uncovered a genuine Tudor relic

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sandra and Dave have been visiting the south of Spain for over 24 years and are now looking for their very own holiday home with a sea view and plenty of outside space for entertaining their family, including their young grandson Henry. Danni Menzies is tasked with finding them the best of what their £180,000 budget can get them in and around La Duquesa on the Costa del Sol

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in Bournemouth, 38-year-old bar manager and musician Adie, hopes to hit the right notes by ensuring his night of laid back fun is full of music and laughter. With trumpets and drums at the ready and tricky crustaceans proving hard to crack, does Adie have what it takes to win the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second Bournemouth host is aristocratic vet Sir Henry, who plans to charm his way to the prize by hosting an evening of relaxed dining

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Countryside-loving Pippa from Bournemouth hopes to impress her guests by throwing a dinner party with every course inspired by fish

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, spiritual student Simone hopes to wow her guests with a spicy Bajan menu. Shes keen to impress her new friend, posh vet Sir Henry, but shes unsure about Pippa, who doesnt hold back as she probes Simone about her student house

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Bournemouth, flamboyant charity manager Jacqueline hopes that Michelin star-style food will win her the prize. With partridge and black pudding scotch eggs, this could be a culinary night to remember, but will Sir Henry and Simone steal her thunder with an unlikely romance?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is the Grange Boutique Hotel in Grange-over-Sands, Cumbria, where guests complain of stifling rooms and eggs that are not up to standard

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Ruth and Lucy Hinch welcome their rivals to Rutland Luxury Lodges in Greetham, where the guests are relieved to find luxury in abundance - and Laurence is impressed with the stand-out breakfast sausage. However, something is missing for Simon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Laurence and Danny Bowes welcome their guests to the Leicester Arms in Penshurst, Kent, and while some get a spotless welcome, Jackie and Nigel make a few dirty discoveries

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit of the week is to Weston-super-Mare in Somerset and Oakover Guesthouse, owned by former banker Simon Robinson and partner Ann Wilson. Most guests are delighted by the decor, but Lucy and Ruth get a frosty reception. In the afternoon, some guests reveal their competitive side with all the fun of the fair. But come morning, Jackie and Nigels noses are put out of joint as a bad smell disturbed their sleep. During feedback some feathers are ruffled

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to trade feedback. The guests cover their disappointment at the eggs for breakfast, dirty rooms and complaints about being kept awake at night, as well as criticising one owners strategy

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Master mechanic Fuzz Townshend and petrolhead Tim Shaw return to rescue more classic cars for deserving owners. They begin in County Down in Northern Ireland where the 1987 MG Metro 6R4 rally car has turned up in a scrapyard. The family of rally enthusiast Brian put in the call when a serious stroke prevented him from restoring his amazing discovery, and former driver David Gillanders joins in the fun to rescue the car he last drove three decades ago

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw are in Wolverhampton to take on a 1980 Jaguar XJ-S V12, a great British grand tourer that has sadly fallen into neglect

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Lexi hopes to bond with Sam and Jackson, Bobby and Milly try to put Johnnos broken heart back together and energetic puppy Cookie may be too much for dancers Ash and Mike

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of musician Toby Leeming as he sets out to build a house wrapped around an ancient oak tree in rural Suffolk. The design for Tobys five-building home contains six bedrooms, six bathrooms, a music studio and an annexe - a vast project more like a village than a house. Creating this life changing vision on a £530k budget, and in only eight months, will not be an easy task, especially as they must build up close to an ancient oak without destroying any of the roots

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Zahid and Ferzana from Leeds as they set out to transform an obsolete coastguard station in East Yorkshire into a cantilevered, three-storey home made of steel and glass to enhance their panoramic sea views. With a tight budget of £325,000 and a goal of finishing in 10 months, the pair had their son Yusef manage the project but when Yusef gets a career opportunity he cant turn down and Covid hits the couples business, will they be able to stick to their budget and time frame?

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Abby has had an accident at a diving pool and needs to have her head and neck scanned for serious injuries. Worried mum Nikki puts on a brave face while doctors perform tests, but dad Scott is stuck hundreds of miles away in Scotland. Meanwhile, Anne and Holton - part of a security team dealing with more than 50 incidents a month - encounter a variety of challenging patients on the night shift at Kings College Hospital in London

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Patients arriving at Kings College Hospital in London include 26-year-old Nicholas, whose jaw has been fractured and dislocated in an unprovoked attack, and Tyrell, 17, who needs to have a blackened toenail removed following a football injury. Meanwhile, Ho has brought his grandmother Amoui to the ward after finding her collapsed in her flat

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man has been making repeated calls claiming to be having a heart attack. He lives near the hospital and in the past has used an ambulance as a taxi to get him home. Paramedics also treat a woman who is in agony with a slipped disc, a man with a chronic lung disease who can hardly breathe, and a patient who is unresponsive

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Abby has had an accident at a diving pool and needs to have her head and neck scanned for serious injuries. Worried mum Nikki puts on a brave face while doctors perform tests, but dad Scott is stuck hundreds of miles away in Scotland. Meanwhile, Anne and Holton - part of a security team dealing with more than 50 incidents a month - encounter a variety of challenging patients on the night shift at Kings College Hospital in London

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Patients arriving at Kings College Hospital in London include 26-year-old Nicholas, whose jaw has been fractured and dislocated in an unprovoked attack, and Tyrell, 17, who needs to have a blackened toenail removed following a football injury. Meanwhile, Ho has brought his grandmother Amoui to the ward after finding her collapsed in her flat

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: In the driving seat for the final day in Benidorm is Ray from Windsor, Berkshire, who schedules a day touring the winding country roads of the Costa Blanca in classic cars. The final destination is a luxury golfing resort, where the weeks winner is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Newlyweds Pip Easby and Nicky Lesser-Easby, who run Muddifords Court Country House in Devon, open their doors for the final stay of the competition. The Churches find their four-poster bed too small, and not all the guests enjoy their trip to a local glass-blowing factory, but feedback at check-out time leaves the hosts feeling confident

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting the Isle of Wight to meet a couple who have lots of unwanted militaria in their sheds. While Henry embarks on an ambitious project to turn tank parts into hanging baskets, Simon plans to transform old insulators into studio flat lighting

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mia has sold her house in west London, is taking early retirement and plans to move permanently to the countryside near Alicante in Spain. Her mum Valerie - who plans to visit Mia regularly - is helping with the house hunt. For her budget of £170,000, Mia wants to find a secluded property in the hills, but Valerie thinks she would be better off in a town with amenities. Laura Hamilton is tasked with helping them find the perfect property

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, performing arts director Anthony plans a theatre-themed menu for his guests, Ross, Tula, Kola and Julie. However, straight-talking Tula tries to steal the show with a candid revelation and Julie brings the house down with some frisky fun at Kolas expense. Anthonys plans go awry in the kitchen, threatening to earn him more rotten earn tomatoes than rave reviews

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salesman Ross hosts the second party from Swansea, but his guests make a discovery that leaves him with some explaining to do, while tension erupts between him and Kola

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social carer Kola provides plenty of hip-hop swagger on the third day of the contest in Swansea, with a Nigerian menu he hopes will both educate and impress his fellow diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Triathlete Tula serves a Spanish-themed menu in Swansea, hoping charm and chorizo can smooth over the dispute between Ross and Julie and avoid a punch-up over the paella

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social worker Julie plans a chilled out slumber party for the final night of the week in Swansea. She cooks a homely menu, but struggles with the pronunciation as well as the preparation of some of her ingredients. At the end of another eventful evening, the winner of the £1,000 prize is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination is the Masons Arms in Meysey Hampton, Gloucestershire, where guests try cold-water swimming, before struggling with a disturbed nights sleep

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival hoteliers arrive at Wards Hotel in Folkestone, where hosts Dill and Darsy have high expectations to meet after revealing their extensive industry experience day one

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Queens Arms in Berkshire, where horse racing enthusiasts Ben and Freddie treat their rivals to an afternoon of riding at nearby Newbury racecourse - only for an uncomfortable night and cleanliness complaints to cause the scores to tumble at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Midshires Way Campsite in East Leake, Nottinghamshire, run by Brendon and Vicky. The guests love their lodges and are big fans of the finishing touches, though Dill and Darsy arent sure about the value for money. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in Bournemouth, 38-year-old bar manager and musician Adie, hopes to hit the right notes by ensuring his night of laid back fun is full of music and laughter. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second Bournemouth host is aristocratic vet Sir Henry, who plans to charm his way to the prize by hosting an evening of relaxed dining

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Countryside-loving Pippa from Bournemouth hopes to impress her guests by throwing a dinner party with every course inspired by fish

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

But come morning, Jackie and Nigels noses are put out of joint as a bad smell disturbed their sleep. During feedback some feathers are ruffled

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to trade feedback. The guests cover their disappointment at the eggs for breakfast, dirty rooms and complaints about being kept awake at night, as well as criticising one owners strategy

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Master mechanic Fuzz Townshend and petrolhead Tim Shaw return to rescue more classic cars for deserving owners. The family of rally enthusiast Brian put in the call when a serious stroke prevented him from restoring his amazing discovery, and former driver David Gillanders joins in the fun to rescue the car he last drove three decades ago

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Lexi hopes to bond with Sam and Jackson, Bobby and Milly try to put Johnnos broken heart back together and energetic puppy Cookie may be too much for dancers Ash and Mike

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of musician Toby Leeming as he sets out to build a house wrapped around an ancient oak tree in rural Suffolk. The design for Tobys five-building home contains six bedrooms, six bathrooms, a music studio and an annexe - a vast project more like a village than a house. Creating this life changing vision on a £530k budget, and in only eight months, will not be an easy task, especially as they must build up close to an ancient oak without destroying any of the roots

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of Zahid and Ferzana from Leeds as they set out to transform an obsolete coastguard station in East Yorkshire into a cantilevered, three-storey home made of steel and glass to enhance their panoramic sea views. With a tight budget of £325,000 and a goal of finishing in 10 months, the pair had their son Yusef manage the project but when Yusef gets a career opportunity he cant turn down and Covid hits the couples business, will they be able to stick to their budget and time frame?

programme.title: Help! Im in a Secret Relationship!

programme.desc: Radio expert Mark Stuckey has a job on his hands, repairing a 1930s transistor radio brought into the Repair Shop by David Hill from Brecon. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Anna Maxwell Martin researches her family tree. Travelling to the small town in Northern Ireland where her father grew up, her understanding of her grandparents - who suffered a heartbreaking family tragedy - is turned on its head. On her mothers side, Anna starts with her grandfather Maxwell, whose name she added to her own to create her stage name. Looking into his childhood, she uncovers a dark history of domestic abuse and family separation. However, she also discovers extraordinary familial solidarity and love that changed the pattern for the generations that followed

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Anna Maxwell Martin researches her family tree. Travelling to the small town in Northern Ireland where her father grew up, her understanding of her grandparents - who suffered a heartbreaking family tragedy - is turned on its head. On her mothers side, Anna starts with her grandfather Maxwell, whose name she added to her own to create her stage name. Looking into his childhood, she uncovers a dark history of domestic abuse and family separation. However, she also discovers extraordinary familial solidarity and love that changed the pattern for the generations that followed

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Celebrities trace their family trees and uncover facts about their heritage. In the first episode, actress Una Stubbs embarks on a quest to learn about the grandparents she never met. As she delves into their history, she uncovers a surprising connection between her paternal grandfather and the confectionery company she modelled for in the 1950s. Another coincidental link also comes to light - between her forebears chosen home town of Welwyn Garden City, Hertfordshire, and the areas founder, Ebenezer Howard

programme.desc: Josh and Sandra join Denise and Kim for a drink in the Albert as he searches for answers about Jasmine, but Denise soon puts her foot in it by mentioning Zoe. Lauren and Peter meet a mum whose baby is also visually impaired, to discuss a specialist nursery, but the pair bristle when they realise the cost. Elsewhere, Billy grows concerned about Beas obsession with his family after speaking to Harvey, and Suki comes to blows with Penny and Vinny about the pregnancy

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva serves up a fresh selection of recipes including Chinese style garlic butter spaghetti, prawn tom yum soup, Korean style beef burgers and oyakodon, a Japanese chicken and egg rice bowl

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguires first stop is at the Titanic Museum where Visitor Experience crew member Johanna Deaney takes Neven back in time as she describes the food on the Titanic. He travels up the Antrim coast to enjoy some traditional snacks at Glen of Antrim Crisp, before preparing his own dish of chicken sauce lyonnaise with crushed baby potatoes

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Housewife of the Year (2024)
programme.desc: Between 1967 and 1995, many women took part in the annual televised competition Housewife of the Year. This documentary hears from some of the contestants, sharing their experiences of the contest - and much more besides. Winner of Best Irish Feature Documentary at the Galway Film Fleadh 2024

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Architect Hugh Wallace meets people transforming derelict properties into modern homes. Having worked two jobs to save for his first home, primary school teacher and landscape gardener Sean Hickey is planning to restore his Victorian home in Kilkenny City with 100,000 euros, but the work required threatens to over-extend his budget

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Violet plans a day at the seaside - her first key event since becoming mayor. Having returned to Poplar, Cyril is working with problem families in the area, arranging for some to attend a new playgroup at St Oswalds church. He invites them, including heavily pregnant Lindy Webster, to the excursion. Despite the poor weather everyone has a good time, but the atmosphere quickly changes when Lindy goes into labour. Dr Turner and Shelagh are blindsided when Mays future with them is called into question, Nurse Crane helps a young couple cope with a rare cancer diagnosis, while Trixie finally passes her driving test

programme.title: DJ Carey: The Dodger
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary about the rise and fall of the GAA icon, asking how a man lauded internationally ended up pleading guilty to defrauding people of hundreds of thousands of euros by falsely claiming to have cancer. His story begins with his success on the pitch as he went on to win five All-Irelands and nine All-star medals. Yet as he cultivated the image of a clean-cut role model, strange rumours were already being whispered about the Dodger

programme.title: Camogie: Inside the Championship
programme.desc: Part one of two. Following the All Ireland Camogie Championship from start to finish, combining multiple teams and stories, witnessing heartbreak and triumph, culminating in a winner-takes-all climax at Croker

programme.title: President Connolly: How The Race Was Won
programme.desc: A documentary featuring unprecedented access to the 2025 presidential election, with exclusive behind-the-scenes footage, interviews and fresh insight from figures inside and outside the campaign

programme.title: The Irish Civil War
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic and often challenging story of the origins, conflict and legacy of the civil war that took place in Ireland in 1922 and 1923

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: For years Henry Hunt and Lorraine Casey have dreamed of making much-needed improvements to the Smugglers Inn, which has been in Henrys family for generations, but despite commissioning extensive and expensive plans over the years they have never been able to realise their ambitions. Time and money are issues, while the couple also have to care for their baby daughter. Theyre exhausted and badly need the Brennans advice to find a better work-life balance and to make their dream of a modern, fit-for-purpose business come true.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Murder Is Easy
programme.desc: Adaptation of the mystery thriller, set in 1954. On a train to London, Fitzwilliam (David Jonsson) meets Miss Pinkerton (Penelope Wilton), who tells him that a killer is on the loose in the sleepy English village of Wychwood under Ashe. The villagers believe the deaths are mere accidents, but Miss Pinkerton knows otherwise - and when shes later found dead on her way to Scotland Yard, Fitzwilliam feels he must find the killer before they can strike again. programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football
programme.desc: Five part series, delving into the role of Gaelic football in the sporting, cultural and social history of modern Ireland. The first edition takes viewers on a journey back in time, to the rough and tumble origins of Gaelic football. Through rebellion and civil war, it exploded like a prairie fire to become the most played game in Ireland

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Edens crushed by Remis news. Mali questions Holdens motives. Cash and Levi are in the doghouse

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Champions League Live
programme.desc: Liverpool v Galatasaray (Kick-off 8.00pm). Darragh Maloney is joined by Didi Hamann and Richie Sadlier to present coverage of the last-16 second-leg match at Anfield. For the second time this season, Liverpool lost 1-0 at Rams Park in the first leg, but they will have high hopes of turning things around in front of their own fans. With commentary by Des Curran and Ray Houghton

programme.title: Greys Anatomy
programme.desc: Bailey and Owen join forces to save a tumor patient; Richard faces an internal battle; Jules struggles with her feelings for Winston.

programme.title: The Newsreader
programme.desc: As Public Eye reaches number one, Helen is blindsided by a front-page article revealing her history of mental health struggles and institutionalisation. As she considers how to respond, she focuses her energy on a special report about the mental health system. Newsroom drama, starring Anna Torv and Sam Reid

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Does Kerrie deserve a goodbye? Sonnys confronted by his new life. Mali sees through Holden

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The pastry chefs face chocolate week, presenting 24 perfectly spherical chocolate desserts alongside another 24 celebrating the season of spring. for the showpiece they must create a piece inspired by the Tales of the High Seas, mythical pieces, 48 chocolate bars and a moving part. Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden judge their efforts, while Stacey Solomon and Liam Charles keep things going

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to Cornwall to see former skydivers Leigh and Richards progress on the transformation of a derelict 17th century flour mill into a four storey, three-bedroom home. The pair fell in love with the building back in 2017 and put their lives on hold to move 250 miles to live in a caravan on site while they renovated the building, giving themselves just 12 months and a £250,000 budget. Once work began the true scale of the damage to the building was revealed and the couple were forced to pay out unexpected bills and take on a lot of the work load themselves. When the pandemic hit, the mission to finish the mill became an all-consuming affair but by January 2021 they still werent finished

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Attempting to improve her dating record, Jesse, 22, from Meath meets fellow student nurse Michael, 23, from Laois. Bus driver and dedicated ladies man Ronan, 61, from Drogheda meets Sharon, 56, from Dublin. And aspiring entertainer Kate, 32, from Kildare takes to the stage with stand-up comic James, 34, also from Dublin

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns play host to Katya, one of a group of Ukrainian children who have been sent from their homeland in the wake of the Chernobyl nuclear disaster. But while Erin is excited about sharing her wisdom with her house guest, Katya turns out to be a lot less grateful to be in Derry than expected. Meanwhile, the rest of the family has other preoccupations - a new development in Granda Joes love life that leaves his daughters deeply unimpressed

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: Featuring performances from the Scratch, Sorcha Richardson and Seán McKeon

programme.title: Rob and Rylans Grand Tour

programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to Cornwall to see former skydivers Leigh and Richards progress on the transformation of a derelict 17th century flour mill into a four storey, three-bedroom home. The pair fell in love with the building back in 2017 and put their lives on hold to move 250 miles to live in a caravan on site while they renovated the building, giving themselves just 12 months and a £250,000 budget. Once work began the true scale of the damage to the building was revealed and the couple were forced to pay out unexpected bills and take on a lot of the work load themselves. When the pandemic hit, the mission to finish the mill became an all-consuming affair but by January 2021 they still werent finished

programme.desc: Art critic Waldemar Januszczak continues his examination of Mannerism, this time enjoying some of the more surreal selections from the movement, including Giuseppe Arcimboldos playful, fruity portrait of Holy Roman Emperor Rudolf II titled Vertumnus

programme.title: Welcome to the Eighties
programme.desc: An exploration of the music of the decade, beginning with a look at how punks attitude inspired a wave of creativity and change in the music world

programme.title: Pauline Black: A 2-Tone Story (2024)
programme.desc: Documentary tracing the Selecter frontwomans career in music, as she discusses her experience of adoption, abuse, persona, gender and perseverance. programme.title: Record On

programme.desc: A profile of the band, spanning the decades from the bands formation to later albums Encore and Protest Songs

programme.title: Arts Most

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: The art collection of the singer-songwriter goes under the hammer at Christies in a special auction featuring works by Tracey Emin, Damien Hirst and Bridget Riley

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: A rare painting by Christopher Nevinson comes to Sothebys, while bidders scramble for the final painting by Winston Churchill - of his beloved goldfish pool at Chartwell

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Salvator Mundi, the long-lost Leonardo da Vinci painting of Jesus Christ commissioned by King Louis XII, which was set to break all records at auction at Christies in New York

programme.title: Notre-Dame: The Renaissance
programme.desc: A 2024 concert marking the reopening of the cathedral five years after a devastating fire, featuring Pharrell Williams, Angelique Kidjo, Lang Lang, Benjamin Bernheim, Marion Cotillard, Yo-Yo Ma, Khatia Buniatishvili, Pretty Yende and Daniel Lozakovich

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a scene in which the evening sky sets in, giving way to a perfect glow

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A couple rely on home-made medicine to treat their sickly child, using royal jelly from the familys bee hives. However, the outcome proves frightening. Drama, starring Susan George and Timothy West

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A deadly snake strikes in the heat of Kashmir, creeping into a young teachers bed and settling on his belly. Drama, with Judy Geeson, Andrew Ray, Anthony Steel and Saeed Jaffrey

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An Austrian couple rejoice when, following a difficult pregnancy, they finally bring their son into the world - but their celebrations may be premature

programme.title: Stories from Tate Britain
programme.desc: Part one of two. Kate Bryan goes behind the scenes at the gallery, finding out about the origins of Tate Britain and the development of modern art in the UK. She meets director Maria Balshaw to hear about the different Tate sites and how they interconnect, and explores the life and work of William Blake before finding out about Elizabeth Siddal, the woman behind the Pre-Raphaelite Brotherhood

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Art historian Siân Walters and writer James Payne explore masterpieces, delving into the stories behind the canvas of the worlds most famous paintings. programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars (1964)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunslinger rides into a town on the Mexican border divided by two warring families. After killing the henchmen of one clan, he seems to have made it clear where his loyalties lie and is hired by their rivals. However, he is secretly planning to play them off against each other to his own advantage. Sergio Leones Western, with Clint Eastwood making his first appearance as The Man with No Name alongside Gian Maria Volonte and Marianne Koch

programme.desc: Bill completes Jessicas transformation into a vampire - but when he reveals what has happened, her reaction surprises him. programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixhams annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. Landlady Pat Seddon is not looking forward to the raucous celebrations, however, and decides to reminisce about past race days instead. The programme also meets Matt Kimble, a graduate who gave up on his plan to become a PE teacher and decided to follow his ancestors into the fishing trade instead

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing

programme.title: True Detective

The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. programme.title: True Detective

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. Later, Hank receives a quid pro quo offer

programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The militant arm of the Faith of the Seven grows more aggressive, Jaime and Bronn head south and Ellaria and the Sand Snakes vow vengeance

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon enlists the help of an unexpected ally, Daenerys makes a difficult decision in Mereen, Brienne searches for Sansa, and Theon remains under Ramsays control

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Paul arrives at Ginas office, nervously awaiting the verdict of the court hearing into his part in Alexs suicide. As they discuss the traumatic events he has been through over the past year, he reveals he wants to leave therapy - and though he tries to make excuses, Gina believes she knows the real reason for his decision. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Dianne Wiest

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham relives its glory days by hosting a vintage ships race and heritage festival, and a local toy-shop owner faces a difficult decision

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Carmela uses her Mafia connections to lend Meadow a helping hand, Tony is not impressed by a conciliatory gesture from Richie, and Matt and Sean walk out of their latest job. James Gandolfini and Edie Falco star

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Carmela confronts Tony about his infidelity, Christopher has a near-death experience, and Paulie is shaken up by a message from the underworld. Drama, starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne and Roland chase new leads as Amelia attempts to uncover the whereabouts of the mysterious one-eyed man

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne struggles to hold on to his memories and his grip on reality as the truth behind the Purcell case is finally revealed

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: When Julias mental-health struggles resurface, Navarro takes her to a local facility, promising that this time will be better. Later, Danvers and Navarro confirm the location of Annies murder, while the police chief levies a harsh punishment on Leah following her stepdaughters act of protest

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. At a meeting with Silver Sky executve Kate McKitterick, Danvers balks when Connelly shares the official cause of the Tsalal mens deaths - and gets a warning against pursuing the case any further. Later, Hank receives a quid pro quo offer

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the midst of a brutal storm, Danvers and Navarro find themselves stuck at Tsalal with no electricity or means of contact. As the truth about what happened to Annie and the Tsalal men unfolds, Navarro and Danvers each confront the demons from their past.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Westeros, Jon returns to the Wall from his controversial ranging mission, and Stannis faces a difficult decision. Meanwhile, in Braavos, Arya runs into a familiar face and Mace Tyrell visits the Iron Bank, and against her better judgement Daenerys hosts a traditional Meereenese celebration of athleticism. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington, Stephen Dillane, Maisie Williams and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Fear Index
programme.desc: A fatal plane crash causes airline stocks to plummet. Alex harbours his own concerns when he finds terrorist websites open on his computer

programme.title: The Undoing
programme.desc: Attorney Haley Fitzgerald begins to shape the narrative of the case and looks into Grace and Jonathans pasts. Meanwhile, Franklin comes to Henrys defence

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya continues her training at the House of Black and White, Jorah and Tyrion run into slavers and the Sand Snakes mount an attack. Fantasy, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon prepares for conflict, Sansa tries to talk to Theon, and Brienne waits for a sign. Elsewhere, Jaime attempts to reconnect with his family

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya makes progress in her training, Sansa confronts an old friend, Cersei faces a struggle and Jon embarks on a journey. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Westeros, Jon returns to the Wall from his controversial ranging mission, and Stannis faces a difficult decision. Meanwhile, in Braavos, Arya runs into a familiar face and Mace Tyrell visits the Iron Bank, and against her better judgement Daenerys hosts a traditional Meereenese celebration of athleticism. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington, Stephen Dillane, Maisie Williams and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The High Sparrow and his militant followers appear to have made an indelible mark on Kings Landing as Cersei finds herself seeking forgiveness. Meanwhile, in the North, Stannis embarks on a gruelling march, and Jon is challenged, and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is surrounded by strangers as the fifth chapter of the hit fantasy drama draws to a close. Starring Kit Harington, Emilia Clarke, Lena Headey and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Mia tells Paul she confronted her father about her childhood, but the resulting argument left her unable to leave her bed for three days. She then threatens to leave therapy, before challenging Paul to break his professional boundaries by sleeping with her. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Hope Davis

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony learns there was an eyewitness to the Bevilaqua hit, so begins gathering money in case he needs to go on the run. Richie tries to persuade Junior to aid him in his plans. Carmela has a romantic encounter, and Big Pussy comes under pressure from the FBI

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony is advised by his lawyer to spend time at one of his legitimate businesses - but inactivity takes its toll. Junior enjoys the company of a police officers widow, Dr Melfi gets into a public argument and Richie continues to disobey orders. Gritty drama, starring James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Edie Falco

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Margaret travels to Brooklyn for a difficult reunion with the family she left behind in Ireland, while Jimmy faces a decision that could shape the future of Atlantic City. The arrival of Daughertys new federal prosecutor leaves Van Alden weighing his options, a despairing Lucy turns to an old friend for support, and Nucky sets about promoting heavyweight boxing champion Jack Dempseys next fight

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An ageing hitman must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. Director Simon Wests comedy, starring Christoph Waltz, Lucy Liu and Cooper Hoffman

programme.title: The Killer (2024)
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an attempt to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer. Director/Producer John Woos remake of his namesake 1989 thriller, starring Nathalie Emmanuel, Omar Sy and Sam Worthington

programme.title: The Beekeeper (2024)
programme.desc: An apparently unassuming man finds someone very important to him has been scammed and driven to harm. Revealed as a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers, he sets out on a brutal quest of vengeance, hunting those responsible for the incident, who have seriously underestimated how much of a threat he is. Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Jeremy Irons, Minnie Driver and Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: The Bourne Identity (2002)
programme.desc: A fishing boat crew plucks a man out of the sea with two bullet wounds in his back and a safety-deposit number sewn into his skin - but absolutely no memory of who he is or how he got there. In the search for his true identity, he is pursued by assassins - but his skill at evading them suggests his own past is far from straightforward. Thriller, starring Matt Damon, Franka Potente, Chris Cooper, Clive Owen and Brian Cox

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. A CIA operation has ended in disaster, and those responsible intend to clear their names by implicating Bourne. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy (2012)
programme.desc: The leaders of a secret government agency plan to eliminate several agents as part of a cover-up when they face having their dark secrets exposed. One of the targets is able to evade his fate and go on the run - but his escape is threatened by his dependence on drugs to boost his physical and mental capabilities. Spy thriller sequel, with Jeremy Renner, Rachel Weisz and Edward Norton

programme.title: Jason Bourne (2016)
programme.desc: Former government operative Jason Bourne has been in hiding for 12 years after exposing a sinister CIA operation. However, he once again finds himself being hunted down when a former CIA operative gone rogue acquires top secret information - including details of Bournes own fathers involvement in a clandestine scheme. Action thriller, starring Matt Damon, Tommy Lee Jones, Alicia Vikander and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
programme.desc: A series of interlinked stories about the Los Angeles underworld. A hitman plays minder to his bosss wife, and he and his partner deal with a dead body following a mishap with a gun. Meanwhile, a washed-up boxer goes on the run after refusing to throw a fight, and two lovers plot a hold-up in a diner. Quentin Tarantinos crime drama, starring John Travolta, Samuel L Jackson, Uma Thurman, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Tim Roth and Amanda Plummer

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An ageing hitman must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. Director Simon Wests comedy, starring Christoph Waltz, Lucy Liu and Cooper Hoffman

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: The Accountant (2016)
programme.desc: Autistic number-cruncher Christian Wolff moonlights as a money launderer for the Mob. However, the Treasury Department start closing in on him, so he decides to take on a legitimate client in the form of a robotics company. As he works through their books, he uncovers a discrepancy involving millions of dollars. Action-packed thriller, starring Ben Affleck, Anna Kendrick and JK Simmons

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: American Star (2024)
programme.desc: Out to kill a man he has never met, Wilson, a seasoned assassin completing his final assignment in Fuerteventura, is drawn to a ghostly shipwreck. Thriller, starring Ian McShane, Nora Arnezeder and Fanny Ardant

programme.title: The Hanging Sun (2022)
programme.desc: Fleeing from his ex-employer, John, a reluctant assassin, seeks refuge in an isolated village, where he is faced with events that test his conscience. Drama based on the Jo Nesbo novel, starring Alessandro Borghi, Jessica Brown Findlay, Peter Mullan and Charles Dance

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Lego DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs Bizarro League (2015)
programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseids attempt to conquer the galaxy

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer (2013)
programme.desc: A farm boy accidentally rebuilds the link between the human world and a kingdom of man-eating giants in the sky, resulting in a princess being trapped in the monsters realm. He joins a band of the kings knights on a rescue mission, but one of the group intends to betray them in a bid to seize the throne. Fantasy adventure, starring Nicholas Hoult and Ewan McGregor

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Police 24/7
programme.desc: The police deal with a situation involving a woman with illegal drugs and cancer. An elderly man suffers from a panic attack

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A look at the life and crimes of William Devin Howell, who was found guilty of the murders of seven different women

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer

programme.title: The Invisible Pilot
programme.desc: Facing decades in prison, Gary testifies in the investigation into the Iran-Contra affair. But can the testimony of a lifelong felon bring down a president?

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: A recount of the Battle of Gettysburg, when for three days in July 1863 men belonging to the Army of the Potomac and the Army of Northern Virginia fought in the Pennsylvania countryside. The battle recorded the single largest number of casualties of the Civil War, with over 40,000 of the 150,000 fighters being killed, and is regarded as a turning point in the conflict

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts scrutinise the paintings, journals and technical drawings of Leonardo Da Vinci to establish whether they hide evidence of extra-terrestrial beings

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts question whether Nazi leader Adolf Hitler received extraterrestrial help in his quest for world domination

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts try to uncover the truth about alien remains by investigating reports of extraterrestrial bodies recovered from crashed UFOs

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes up from Lyme Regis on Dorsets Jurassic Coast to the Somerset Levels in the footsteps of a ragtag rebel army led by the young Duke of Monmouth, the illegitimate son of Charles II. He sailed in from Holland around Lymes famous Cobb with a handful of soldiers, believing the people would support him in overthrowing the newly crowned James II, who was also Monmouths uncle, but, more importantly, Roman Catholic. The year was 1685 and the country was riven by anti-Catholic feeling mixed up with revolutionary zeal. Monmouth marched through the fiercely independent towns of Devon, gathering support from artisans and farmworkers. Meeting up with Billy Bragg in Colyton, Tony learns about the kind of people prepared to risk their lives for the Monmouth Rebellion

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: The mysterious phone call from an apparently middle-aged woman who predicted the murder of President John F Kennedy. On November 22 1963, a telephone operator in California answered a call that stated that the President was going to die. This came some hours before Lee Harvey Oswald unleashed his fire

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Operation Frankton, of December 1942. The mission was for Royal Marines to place limpet mines on German ships in the occupied Bordeaux Harbour, 62 miles along the Gironde River. Five cockleshell canoes set off from submarine HMS Tuna at the mouth of the river. Only two reached the harbour and carried out the raid, escaping with the aid of the French Resistance. The damage to the ships and the resulting disruption to German supply lines had a significant impact on the war effort

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew rescues the occupants of a critically damaged prison vessel, but begins to question the convicts home planets judicial system after learning they are to be executed - leading to an agonising ethical dilemma

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.sub-title: Where No One Has Gone Before

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Abby and Sarah race to save a civilian who is trapped in a tent when an anomaly opens at a campsite and releases a herd of embolotherium - rhinoceros-type beasts from the Eocene. Danny arrives with a mysterious woman from the future who seems to have the power to stop the stampede, but the team discovers she has a dark secret. Jason Flemyng, Hannah Spearritt and Laila Rouass star

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Having notched up a decisive victory over the Germans at Bastogne, an exhausted Easy Company is ordered to take the nearby town of Foy, but many of the troops are killed in the process. Wartime drama, starring Damian Lewis and Donnie Wahlberg

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Winters is ordered to send a patrol into enemy territory to capture prisoners, but believes the mission to be unacceptably hazardous. programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: The arid, rocky terrain in Goegap Nature Reserve burns in the hot African sun. But not everything in the parched landscape is wilted and bleak, on the edge of a rocky outcrop, an enormous tree boasts with large, leathery, heart-shape leaves. Its pale, gnarled, crinkled roots feeling their way across the massive boulders its perched on, some splitting the rocks in order to find water. This is a Namaqua Rock fig, a tree of myth and fantasy
