programme.desc: Part one of an interview with the pundit, activist, barrister and former footballer, who opens up about his life, trauma and controversies

programme.title: Sport Stories
programme.desc: The second and concluding part of an interview with the former Republic of Ireland star, as he discusses with Tommy Martin the high esteem he was held in for club and country while facing battles on and off the pitch

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade swims into the lair of a snakehead, an aggressive Far Eastern predator that has now invaded America. He tries to ascertain whether it deserves its reputation as a Jack the Ripper fish capable of killing humans, and reveals that the creature is believed to breathe air and crawl on land

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: The work never slows at Sydney Airport, whether its changing a wind sock, painting a runway at midnight or putting out a potentially catastrophic fire

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.sub-title: From the High-Fat to the Cookie and Paleo diets
programme.desc: Dr Xand van Tulleken and dietician Hala El-Shafie help six more people lose weight with different methods. Natasha and Jodian have just two weeks to slim down before a trip to Egypt, with one trying out a high-fat diet and the other eating Mediterranean food. In Hampshire, Mike tries out a regimen that consists almost entirely of specially-made cookies and Steve is on a volumetric diet consisting of large bowls of soup or massive salads, while Gina and Max in Wigan go on paleolithic and starch diets respectively. Xand also investigates the Ken diet, which involves a protein solution being fed straight into the stomach

programme.title: Cooking with the Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen host the celebrity cookery series where famous faces will be cooking up a storm week by week in a bid to outdo their rivals. programme.desc: Ken doubts his ability to care for Lester, who develops a new bond with Jimmy. Lou resents his loss of independence and, against Annes wishes, ventures into town with disastrous consequences. Canadian drama, based on the graphic novel by Jeff Lemire

programme.title: Vigil
programme.desc: Kirsten uncovers evidence suggesting the murders were part of a coordinated attack. Her investigation takes her into the heart of Scottish politics, and the Naval cover up of a near catastrophe in the US. Amy starts to question who she can trust on Vigil, when a message from Kirsten makes Amy realise she is being deliberately undermined

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A face from the dead returns as Bernie prepares to receive his inherited fortune. Meanwhile, a girl brings shame on her father when she unexpectedly gives birth, and the residents of Aidensfield anxiously wait for news of Phil Bellamy

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Cassie displays Nathaniel Merriwicks paintings for Grey Houses 225th birthday. Fantasy, starring Catherine Bell

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of Airlander 10, the worlds largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days

programme.title: Judi Loves Culinary Cruise
programme.desc: The comedians adventures take her to the Greek island of Corfu, where she buys a huge block of butter, gets nostalgic over nutmeg, visits a restaurant thats been run by the same family for 100 years and learns how to make pastitsada, a beef-based pasta dish. Then its back to the yacht to make spicy lamb chops with saffron rice and a yoghurt and cucumber salad

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade continues his investigations into supposedly deadly freshwater creatures. From right across the Amazon there are stories of a colossal fish that is said to swallow men whole. Some call it the lau-lau, others the piraiba. But after 20 years of criss-crossing South America, Jeremy has never seen a specimen big enough to convince him that the fishermens tales are true. In this programme, he heads to a remote and little-known backwater of Guyana on a mission to finally track down this alleged monster

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: A look back at the stories making the headlines in 1999, set to a soundtrack of music from the year

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Kate is confronted by a young pregnant village girl while practising as a partner with the elderly local GP. Nick takes a call saying that a flasher has been sighted on the moors. Nick Berry stars

programme.title: Mountain Vets
programme.desc: On-call vets Rosalind and Aidan tackle the weekend shift in the busy spring calving season. USPCA wildlife officer Phil responds to a couple of sick swans that need rescuing, and just when Rosalind is hoping her weekend shift is drawing to a close, she gets called back to her cousin Mervyns for the second difficult calving of the day

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi tackles the Caspian, a 10-bedroom hotel in Ealing, west London, that desperately needs to be brought up to date to attract more guests. Co-owner Nousha Samari has spent more than four decades in the hospitality business, but is frustrated by how unsuccessful her establishment has become - and the stress is beginning to show in her relationship with son and business partner Samandar

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy and Dylan make a big confession, while the Dingles are suspicious of Joe Tate and Pollard plays detective

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne persuades Sam to share his troubles, Kit is forced to question his own victim, Alya fails to match Adams enthusiasm, and Todd spots Theo lunching with another man

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Dr Ormerod returns to work after his accident, but when his brusque treatment of a hypochondriac schoolgirl ends in tragedy, its clear he still needs time to recover. New nurse Catherine Deane starts her rounds on the wards, and Mr Middleditch has a surprise announcement to make. Robert Daws, Amelia Curtis and Ian Carmichael star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Downs syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Greengrass attempts to turn events to his advantage when a remote farm is raided, and a visitor from London evokes bad memories. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.desc: Tim returns home on bail and talks to Dani about their deteriorating marriage. He also voices his fears of going to prison while his wife resolves to clear his name. Jimmy tries to smooth tension with Matt, who decides to leave and stay with his mum

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sam is supported by his family while Megan faces the music, Adam and Alya strike a deal with Rich, and Todd agrees with Theo that its time to move on

As the couple attempt to close business deals in France, Hermans committed investigation closes in on them, and whats left of their relationship finally implodes

programme.title: Michael Palin in Nigeria
programme.desc: Michael continues his journey by climbing Dala Hill in the centre of the ancient city of Kano in northern Nigeria. He travels to the open-air stadium with Mohammad Adamu - whos lived in Kano all his adult life. The two explore the Hausa sport of dambe, an ancient form of boxing. Michael also meets Amina Ali Nkeki, one of the 276 schoolgirls who were kidnapped by Boko Haram in 2014

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A look at more real-life cases. A womans anger over a neighbourhood dispute leads to deadly revenge. The disappearance of a woman in her fifties leads to a horrific revelation

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.sub-title: Another Little Piece of My Heart
programme.desc: Rosie is shocked when farmer Simon Langley-Smythe shoots her aunts dog Snowy while out on a walk, and PC Younger fails to chase down children who have released livestock from the fields. Meanwhile, Carol is concerned when she sees Julie Langley-Smythe nursing a black eye

programme.title: Good Witch

programme.desc: The worlds tallest roller coaster in Los Angeles Six Flags Amusement Park, which was inspired by scenic railways and steam catapults on aircraft carriers

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.desc: Alanna and Lorna need to operate on a three-legged lurcher, but make a worrying discovery. Elsewhere, vet Martin must try to save twin lambs, and Gillian anaesthetises a goldfish

programme.desc: Kasia takes on her first assignment as an agent - shadowing a Polish woman working in an aircraft factory in Manchester who is suspected of sending information to the Nazis.
